case_title: QUIJADA, CARLOS ANTONIO VS RODRIGUEZ, ARMANDO (R/O)

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY QUIJADA, CARLOS ANTONIO AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ARMANDO  (R/O) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-23-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QUIJADA, CARLOS ANTONIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ARMANDO  (R/O) $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,020.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ARMANDO  (R/O)
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-23-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-28-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PLTF TO BRING PROOF IN SUPPORT OF HIS CLAIM.
